branch.branch_summary: Run a runtime-backed direction review for the post-v6.8 frontier, compare executable pre-implementation quality gates, standalone context/reference audits, and governed multi-actor orchestration, then open exactly one bounded implementation task.

tree_answer.where_are_we: The runtime is between v6.8 and the next concrete branch.
tree_answer.why_this_branch: Select the next bounded frontier after v6.8.0 using a runtime-backed direction review; do not open implementation work until the next release goal is explicitly selected.
tree_answer.what_branch_comes_next: Run a runtime-backed direction review before opening the next implementation task: Run a runtime-backed direction review for the post-v6.8 frontier, compare executable pre-implementation quality gates, standalone context/reference audits, and governed multi-actor orchestration, then open exactly one bounded implementation task.
